name: Build a Landing Page Hero with Form
prompt:
Build a landing page hero section with a signup form in HTML and CSS. Save as `hero.html`.

Layout:
- Full-viewport-height hero with dark gradient background (#1e3a8a to #7c3aed)
- Left side: h1 headline 'Build Better Products Faster', subheading, 3 feature bullets with emoji icons
- Right side: signup card (white bg) with email input, password input, CTA button
- Mobile (<768px): form stacks below content

Styling:
- White text on dark gradient
- Signup card: white, shadow, rounded
- Input focus styles with colored border transition
- CTA button: #f59e0b accent, hover darkens
- :invalid pseudo-class for error states (red border)

Accessibility:
- Semantic <form> with labels, aria attributes
- Proper label associations

No JS, no libraries, pure HTML/CSS.

criteria.description: Desktop left content + right form card layout.
White signup card with shadow and rounded corners.
Email input, password input, CTA button.
Input focus with colored border transition.
Labels associated with inputs, semantic form.

eval.rubric:
Criterion 1: Visual Impact (Weight: 40%)
1.0: Professional landing page feel, gradient looks good, typography clear, form card stands out.
0.5: Functional but visually flat.
0: Unstyled or broken.

Criterion 2: Form UX (Weight: 35%)
1.0: Clearly labeled, meaningful placeholders, prominent CTA, visible error states.
0.5: Form works but UX rough.
0: Form unusable.

Criterion 3: Responsive (Weight: 25%)
1.0: Mobile reflows naturally, text readable, no overflow.
0.5: Works but issues at some viewports.
0: Broken on mobile.
eval.name: Quality Judge
